name: Tee Box West Omaha
about: Tee Box West Omaha is a comprehensive indoor golf training facility that integrates advanced technology with professional coaching. The venue utilizes TrackMan simulators to provide detailed swing analysis, ball flight tracking, and personalized performance data, creating an environment focused on measurable improvement. Beyond simulation, Tee Box offers a holistic approach to golf enhancement with dedicated spaces for club fittings, repairs, fitness training, and nutritional guidance, all under the guidance of TPI-certified coaches. Membership is the primary access model, designed to provide year-round, all-weather practice and training for golfers committed to refining their game through data-driven methods and professional support.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven improvement using TrackMan technology for precise swing and shot analysis
Comprehensive all-in-one training with included gym access, club fittings, and monthly lessons
All-weather, year-round access to a large variety of virtual golf courses

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service.
No mention of a bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium dual radar and camera system providing professional-grade shot and swing data.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs. The venue also offers professional club fitting and repair services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The website does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar. It is recommended to check with the venue directly regarding outside food and drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While a specific time is not listed, the technology allows for efficient play, and membership includes unlimited access for practice and playing.

faq.question: Is Tee Box kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf programs, youth training, and is described as a supportive environment for new golfers and young players.
